response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 14+ years experience and proven architectural capability, but significant technical mismatch for this role. C++ experience is dated (last substantial work 2016-2018), and recent career has shifted toward web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Lacks documented expertise in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, and critical security standards (IEC 62443). Would require substantial ramp-up time on core technical requirements despite having the seniority level and learning ability to potentially succeed.
strengths: 14+ years total software engineering experience with consistent senior/staff-level roles exceeding the 8-12 year requirement and relevant CS degree
Demonstrated architectural and system design thinking through high-performance systems work (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby) and mentoring experience (workshops, code dojos, courses)
Strong multi-language adaptability and ability to learn complex technical domains quickly, as evidenced by work across JavaScript, TypeScript, D Lang, C#, Java, and others
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience; last significant C++ work was 2016-2018 at Altom Consulting; primary recent stack is TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Python
No background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or system-level programming (networking, multi-threading); career trajectory has shifted toward web and full-stack technologies
No documented security standards expertise (IEC 62443 not mentioned), secure development lifecycle practices, or relevant industrial cybersecurity knowledge required for this role
